title: 2 Way Cosmetic Mirror 4" | Foldable Makeup Mirror Handheld | Two Side Magnifying Mirror | Vanity Makeup Mirror | 360 Swivel Design
features: Double the View: One side features a regular mirror for clear, close-up application, while the other boasts a 2x magnifying mirror for precise brow shaping, eyeliner strokes, and flawless lipstick lines. Never miss a detail again!
Pocket-Sized Perfection: Compact and lightweight, this mirror slips easily into your purse, clutch, or makeup bag, making it your trusted companion for quick fixes throughout the day.
Durable & Sleek: Crafted with high-quality materials and finished in a stylish design, this mirror is built to last and complements your beauty arsenal.
Multi-Angle Advantage: The 360-degree rotating hinge lets you adjust the viewing angle effortlessly, ensuring optimal lighting and visibility for any task.
Travel-Friendly: Shatterproof design makes it perfect for throwing in your suitcase or backpack without worry. Travel light and look your best wherever you go!
description: 4" 2 way cosmetic mirror is available to order in bulk. One side is a 4 inch regular circle mirror and the other is a twice magnifying mirror. Great to have for convenience when travelling or for desks. Has a sleek and simple design making it fit for multi-purposes. Often used to help apply makeup. 4 Inch 2 Sided mirror Perfect to have when travelling Small stand 360 Swivel design
